title: Staying safe online - Google Safety Centre

Google Account Protecting your privacy starts with the world’s most advanced security Every day, we work toward building a safer internet for everyone. We safeguard your data with proven security technologies, protect your privacy by strictly upholding responsible data practices, and provide easy-to-use settings that put you in control of your personal information. Play video Pause video Security innovations Building for safety Raising the industry standard with our advanced technology The security and privacy of our users is at the core of everything we do and every product we build. We lead the industry in creating and sharing safety technologies that raise industry standards for everyone. AI-POWERED SECURITY Leading the way in AI-powered security We enhance our security with the latest AI technology to make our products secure-by-default and more resistant to the next generation of cyber threats. Our AI-powered protections proactively detect and prevent online threats in real-time across the products you use every day—from AI-powered spam filtering that blocks nearly 1 crore spam emails in Gmail every minute, to Chrome’s Enhanced Safe Browsing that keeps you twice as safe when browsing the web from phishing, malware and scams. Play video Pause video AI-POWERED SECURITY Leading the way in AI-powered security We enhance our security with the latest AI technology to make our products secure-by-default and more resistant to the next generation of cyber threats. Our AI-powered protections proactively detect and prevent online threats in real-time across the products you use every day—from AI-powered spam filtering that blocks nearly 1 crore spam emails in Gmail every minute, to Chrome’s Enhanced Safe Browsing that keeps you twice as safe when browsing the web from phishing, malware and scams. Slide 1, ENCRYPTION Leading the way in encryption When you send an email, share a video, visit a website, or store your photos, the data you create moves between your device, Google services, and our data centres. We protect this data with multiple layers of security, including leading encryption technology like HTTPS, device tokens for payments, and Transport Layer Security. Slide 2, AUTHENTICATION Leading the way in authentication Our built-in authentication tools are designed to help you quickly and securely sign in to all the apps and services you want to use. With Sign in with Google, passkeys, password managers, and password checkups, you can log in with ease and confidence, knowing your personal information is protected. Learn about our authentication tools Slide 3, THREAT-DETECTION Leading the way in threat-detection Our built-in security automatically detects and prevents online threats, and we’ll notify you if there’s something we think you should know about—like a potential scam call,¹ suspicious log-in attempt, or a malicious website, file, or app. And we’ll also provide follow-up guidance to help you strengthen your security. Slide 1 of 3 Play video Pause video Play video Pause video Play video Pause video Slide 1 of 3 ENCRYPTION Leading the way in encryption When you send an email, share a video, visit a website, or store your photos, the data you create moves between your device, Google services, and our data centres. We protect this data with multiple layers of security, including leading encryption technology like HTTPS, device tokens for payments, and Transport Layer Security. AUTHENTICATION Leading the way in authentication Our built-in authentication tools are designed to help you quickly and securely sign in to all the apps and services you want to use. With Sign in with Google, passkeys, password managers, and password checkups, you can log in with ease and confidence, knowing your personal information is protected. Learn about our authentication tools THREAT-DETECTION Leading the way in threat-detection Our built-in security automatically detects and prevents online threats, and we’ll notify you if there’s something we think you should know about—like a potential scam call,¹ suspicious log-in attempt, or a malicious website, file, or app. And we’ll also provide follow-up guidance to help you strengthen your security. Building a safer internet for everyone SECURE BY DEFAULT Industry-leading security, built right in Rising security threats continue to disrupt our everyday lives, from scams in text messages to ransomware attacks on critical infrastructure like hospitals and schools. At Google, we work to protect people and society by staying a step ahead of emerging cyber threats. That’s why our products have built-in protections that make them secure by default. By building innovative AI technology, sharing threat intelligence, and partnering with other cybersecurity experts, we advance global standards that help keep the internet open and secure for everyone. Learn More PRIVATE BY DESIGN Your privacy is personal All Google products are private by design, which means upholding responsible data practices—like never selling your personal information to anyone, ever. It’s why we made auto-delete controls and set the default to automatically and continuously delete core activity data after 18 months, rather than keeping it until you choose to delete it. And we’ve pioneered new privacy-preserving technologies like Federated Learning that make it possible to deliver helpful experiences while protecting individual data and privacy. Learn More SETTINGS Your safety choices, made simple Managing how your data is used is an important part of your online safety. That’s why we build easy-to-use tools that put you in control of your data. From privacy settings to ad settings, you can choose what’s right for you. Learn More SAFER AI AI that puts your safety first AI safety is woven into every stage of development, starting at the model level where we apply our latest advancements in AI to safety techniques like red teaming—scaling our ability to more effectively identify and address potential risks. As we build new AI capabilities, we combine these AI-powered techniques with human insight. Through testing our newest AI products in real-world scenarios, we’re able to uncover nuances in novel risk areas, which inform the design of new safeguards and solutions that help deliver a safer product experience. Learn More FAMILY SAFETY Online safety that’s right for your family We work with experts and educators to build online tools and features that empower families with children of all ages—teens, tweens, and kids—to make informed choices. These family-friendly experiences make it easy to safely explore, play, and learn across our products. Plus, you can always manage apps, screen time, and more with parental controls . Learn More ¹Available on Pixel 9 phones in the US for calls in English only. Available on Pixel 6 and newer Pixel phones in the US, CA, and UK for text messages in English only. Scam Detection is not 100% accurate and scammers constantly change tactics. Always use caution when answering calls from unknown numbers. See g.co/pixel/scam-detection-help for more details.
